name: L.A. Cash Advance
description_short: L.A. Cash Advance offers payday loans and short-term cash advances with same-day funding at two Southern California locations in Bellflower and Lakewood.
description_long: L.A. Cash Advance operates as a direct lender providing payday loans through two physical locations in the Los Angeles area—one in Bellflower and one in Lakewood. The company positions itself as a straightforward alternative for consumers needing immediate cash to bridge gaps between paychecks. They emphasize speed and accessibility, with both locations offering in-person service during extended business hours (9 a.m.–6 p.m. weekdays, 9 a.m.–1 p.m. Saturdays). The Lakewood location is situated near retail landmarks (Hap's Auto Parts and a massage business), making it easy to identify and access. L.A. Cash Advance distinguishes itself through a stated "no hidden fees" policy and a referral program that rewards customers for bringing in new business. The company also maintains a straightforward application process designed for quick approval and funding. Their payday loan product is explicitly described as a short-term solution for meeting financial obligations while waiting for the next paycheck. Customer reviews on their website are positive, with clients praising staff professionalism and service quality. However, like all payday lenders, this business operates in a high-interest lending category with inherent risks. The website provides minimal detail on loan terms, fees, APR rates, repayment periods, or regulatory disclosures—critical information absent from their public-facing content. As a payday lender, L.A. Cash Advance operates within a category known for predatory lending concerns, including rollover cycles and high effective interest rates that can trap borrowers in debt.
address: 2712 E Del Amo Blvd, Lakewood, CA 90712

company_info.headquarters: 2712 E Del Amo Blvd, Lakewood, CA 90712

pros: Direct lender model eliminates intermediary fees and streamlines approval process
Two convenient physical locations in Bellflower and Lakewood with extended weekday hours (9 a.m.–6 p.m.)
Saturday service available at Lakewood location (9 a.m.–1 p.m.)
Stated policy of no hidden fees and simple application process
Referral program that pays existing and non-customer referrals for bringing new business
Positive customer reviews highlighting staff professionalism and service quality
Fast same-day or next-day funding typical of payday loan products
cons: Payday loans typically carry APR rates of 300-500%, creating high-cost debt cycles
No fee, term, or APR information disclosed on website—transparency concerns
Short repayment periods (typically 2 weeks) create rollover risk and debt trap potential
Limited service hours (closed Sundays; Saturday hours only until 1 p.m.) reduce accessibility
No information on alternative products or credit-building resources for customers
best_for: Consumers with immediate cash emergencies ($100-$1,000) and stable employment/income verification
Borrowers who can repay the full loan amount within 2 weeks without rolling over
Customers seeking in-person service and same-day funding in the Bellflower or Lakewood area
diagnosis: L.A. Cash Advance is best for borrowers facing genuine short-term cash emergencies who have stable employment and can repay the full loan within the payday cycle, minimizing rollover risk. The primary caveat: payday loans are among the highest-cost credit products available, with effective APRs often exceeding 400%, and should only be used as a last resort when no other credit alternatives exist.
services: In-person loan applications at physical locations
Quick cash for emergency financial obligations
Lakewood location services (2712 E Del Amo Blvd.)
